join.title: Join a pool — Quiniela FUTVE
join.description: Enter a code to join a private pool.

matchdays.title: Matchdays — Quiniela FUTVE
matchdays.description: Review the pool's official matchdays and matches.

list.title: My pools
list.subtitle: Create private groups, share their code, and review the agreed rules.

empty.title: You do not have any pools yet
empty.body: Create your first private group or join with a code shared by an administrator.

create.title: Configure the group rules
create.subtitle: Nothing will be saved until you review the summary and confirm creation.
create.unavailableBody: Try again later or contact the platform administrator.

general.title: General information
general.body: Identify the pool and select the official season it will use.

description.label: Optional description
description.placeholder: Briefly explain who this pool is for.

financial.title: Participation fee
financial.body: Fees and amounts are informational; the application does not process payments.
financial.freeHelp: No participation amount will be requested.
financial.paidHelp: Each member contributes the configured amount.

prizes.title: Prize settings
prizes.body: Define how the informational prize is calculated and distributed.
prizes.remainderHelp: Percentages may add up to less than 100%. The remaining percentage is not shown as a prize or distributed automatically.

winner_takes_all.label: Pooled amount
winner_takes_all.description: The winner receives the participation fee multiplied by every member.

first_place.label: First-place prize
first_place.description: Set a percentage of the pool or a fixed amount for the winner.

top_three.label: First, second, and third-place prizes
top_three.description: Distribute percentages of the pool or three fixed amounts.

modeHelp.percentage: Calculated from the amount pooled through participation fees.
modeHelp.fixed: Uses values defined in the pool currency.

prediction.title: Prediction and scoring
prediction.body: These rules will be stored for scoring in a later product phase.
prediction.mixedExplanation: In Mixed mode, points are exclusive: an exact score awards score points, not result plus score. If every score in a matchday is exact, the configured bonus is added.

simple.label: Simple
simple.description: Predict home win, draw, or away win.

score.label: Score
score.description: Only the exact score earns points.

mixed.label: Mixed
mixed.description: Awards the result or exact score and rewards a perfect matchday.

summary.title: Review before creating
summary.body: You can return to any step. The server will validate the entire configuration again.
summary.fullPool: 100% of the pooled amount for first place
summary.simpleExplanation: Players choose home, draw, or away and receive the configured points when correct.
summary.scoreExplanation: Players predict the score and only receive points when it is exact.
summary.mixedExplanation: General result: {result} points. Exact score: {score} exclusive points. Perfect matchday: {bonus} additional points.

join.title: Join a pool
join.body: Enter the six-character code shared by an administrator.

detail.createdBody: Share the invitation code to add players.

invitation.title: Invitation code
invitation.body: Only administrators can view this code.

detail.memberListSummary: Showing {visible, number} of {total, number} members on this page.

predictionExplanation.simple: Only a correct general result earns points.
predictionExplanation.score: No partial points are awarded for getting only the general result right.
predictionExplanation.mixed: Result and score points are exclusive. The bonus is added when every score in the matchday is exact.

matchdays.emptyTitle: There are no published matchdays yet
matchdays.emptyBody: The schedule will appear here after it is published.
matchdays.noMatches: This matchday has no published matches.

errors.authentication_required: Your session is no longer valid. Sign in again.
errors.competition_unavailable: The selected season is no longer available.
errors.creation_failed: We could not create the pool. Review the data and try again.
errors.invalid_configuration: Review this step and correct any invalid values.
errors.invalid_invitation_code: The code is invalid or does not exist.
errors.join_failed: We could not complete the join request. Try again.

status.listErrorTitle: We could not load your pools
status.listErrorBody: An error occurred while loading this page. You can try again.
status.errorTitle: We could not load this screen
status.errorBody: An unexpected error occurred. You can try again.
